summary: A handheld continuous recording of a ceremony inside the hangar bay of the aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford, with sailors assembled in dress whites while an official in a 'USS' ballcap is presented a framed citation/document and the crowd applauds. It is a candid event/ceremony recording with ambient sound, no cuts, graphics, or musical scoring. Although tagged as a homecoming, it is raw footage, not a produced music-driven or genre piece.
